title: Peter Alphonso | Senior Associate | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## Senior Associate // Dallas
Peter is a Senior Associate in BAL’s Dallas office. Peter has dedicated his career to providing business immigration solutions to clients in a range of industries, spanning information technology, healthcare, finance and the arts. He also serves multinational clients in the tech sector, providing counsel on a wide range of nonimmigrant and immigrant visa matters. Peter has helped clients to maintain a competitive advantage by developing and managing large-scale immigration programs to hire the most talented professionals in the world. Peter has served as a continuing legal education presenter on F-1 student visas and employment. He has been recognized among Best Lawyers: Ones to Watch in immigration law.
New York Law School, J.D. Boston College, B.S., Finance and History
State Bar of New York
